title: 2026 CRM Cleanup Demand Report
subtitle: What 100 public HubSpot and Salesforce job and project postings reveal

postings.title: Senior GTM Systems and Automation Engineer
postings.observed_signal: Senior GTM Systems and Automation Engineer role owns Salesforce, HubSpot, customer success platforms, enrichment, sequencing, AI, workflow automation, APIs, webhooks, lifecycle management, attribution, routing, renewals, expansion, reporting, forecasting, dedupe, and data governance.

postings.title: Senior Marketing Operations Manager
postings.observed_signal: Senior Marketing Operations Manager role owns global demand-gen operations, executive dashboards, campaign influence, attribution, ROI, lifecycle management, lead scoring, routing, SLAs, UTM governance, HubSpot, Salesforce integrations, ABM, intent, workflow automation, and reporting.

postings.title: Senior Director Growth Marketing and Operations
postings.observed_signal: Senior Director Growth Marketing and Operations role reports to Global SVP Marketing and owns global growth engine, demand generation, marketing technology, AI-powered growth systems, HubSpot, Salesforce integrations, analytics, routing, attribution, lifecycle automation, digital conversion, AEO/AI search, executive reporting, and cross-functional revenue execution.

postings.title: Marketing Operations Manager
postings.observed_signal: Temporary Sr. Marketing Operations Manager role requires expert HubSpot lifecycle/workflows/data hygiene, strong Salesforce lead routing/campaign attribution/opportunity/reporting, WordPress/forms, analytics/attribution, ZoomInfo, Dreamdata, and webinar operations.

postings.title: Marketing Operations Manager
postings.observed_signal: Marketing Operations Manager posting says Turing needs HubSpot ownership across workflows, lifecycle stages, lead scoring, forms, lists, integrations, HubSpot-Salesforce sync, clean data routing, attribution, UTM hygiene, dashboards, and campaign operations.

postings.title: Director of Marketing Operations
postings.observed_signal: Director of Marketing Operations role reports to Dan Stotts and owns systems, data, attribution, campaign operations, lifecycle infrastructure, reporting, HubSpot, Salesforce, Webflow, analytics, automation, PQL/MQL definitions, source attribution, routing, scoring, segmentation, and funnel reporting across PLG, sales-assisted, lifecycle, partnerships, events, and content.

postings.title: Business Operations Analyst
postings.observed_signal: Business Operations Analyst role reports to Revenue Operations Manager and supports Salesforce, NetSuite, HubSpot, integrations, dashboards, recurring and ad hoc reports, data quality, AI-powered documentation/reporting/workflow automation, onboarding/offboarding access, and cross-functional workflows across Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Finance, and Operations.

postings.title: HubSpot CRM Setup Salesforce Implementation Specialist Long Term
postings.observed_signal: Marketplace demand for lifecycle stages, custom properties, forms, lead capture, workflows, reporting dashboards, integrations, migrations, permissions, documentation, and training.

postings.title: Director Revenue Operations

postings.title: GTM Systems Manager
postings.observed_signal: GTM Systems Manager role owns the end-to-end revenue tech stack, Salesforce administration and integrations, systems roadmap, process improvements, data quality, reporting across marketing spend, lead lifecycle, pipeline and forecasting, HubSpot, Outreach, 6Sense, DocuSign, and ZoomInfo.

postings.title: GTM Engineer Salesforce HubSpot RevOps Hrs Week
